title: Junior Frontend Developer at Paytm Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Paytm Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Ventures Solutions:
Paytm Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Ventures Solutions!
